race.comment: Open race to close out the card. KHUMBILA (2) got the job done over this track and trip at the latest outing before being given a bit of a freshen-up. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and can go back-to-back without surprising. IRRESISTIBLE FORCE (11) has a handy record over this distance range with a win and eight placings from 12 attempts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Should prove tough to hold out. CIFONELLI (12) has placed two of three around this circuit and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the finish. CHARTWELL (4) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on his day. Watch for a spike in form. MAXIMUM POWER (8) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be discounted lightly.
